title: Senior Scrum Master (m/w/d)
required_skills: Multiple years of experience as Scrum Master in scalable/agile IT environment
Deep knowledge of Scrum, Kanban, SAFe (ideally also LeSS, Nexus)
Strong understanding of complex IT systems (cloud, software development, data architectures)
Proven coaching and empowerment of teams in difficult phases
Strong communication and moderation skills (also remote)
bonus_skills: Experience with LeSS or Nexus frameworks
matched_skills: Agile sprint ceremonies: participated in planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives at Hapag-Lloyd (partial Scrum experience)
Stakeholder management and communication: cross-functional coordination at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC
German B1 (partial — JD requires fluent German)
missing_skills: Multiple years as Scrum Master (candidate participated in Scrum as a working student, not as a Scrum Master)
SAFe, Kanban, LeSS, Nexus framework expertise (no formal agile methodology certifications)
IT system understanding (cloud, software development, data architectures) — no technical background
Team coaching and empowerment in agile contexts
Conflict resolution and diplomatic moderation in agile environments
Fluent German (B1 vs. required fluent — hard requirement)
core_responsibilities: Guide and develop multiple Scrum teams around IT projects (cloud migration, AI, omnichannel)
Identify, analyse, and resolve blockers systematically
Coach IT teams and Product Owners in agile methods
Support Product Owners with backlog optimisation and prioritisation
Navigate stakeholder management in demanding environment with changing priorities
Establish and evaluate agile metrics and KPIs
recommended_emphasis: This role is a poor match — application is not recommended
The candidate participated in Scrum ceremonies but has never held a Scrum Master role
Fluent German is a hard requirement — B1 is disqualifying
IT systems expertise is core to this role; the candidate has no technical background
summary: Match score 16.7% — poor match. The role requires a seasoned Senior Scrum Master with IT technical background, deep agile framework expertise (SAFe, Kanban), fluent German, and proven team coaching experience. The candidate has peripheral Scrum participation as a working student and B1 German — both significantly below the requirements. Application is not recommended.
